TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kanahcian ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 39 buwan, 145 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 142 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 89%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kanahcian hya' ga Kanaluk. tay mkyahu' na Kanahcian hya' ga Bacingul. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kanahcian ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kanaħʦ~ʨian ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu umitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kanaħʦ~ʨian ħjaʔ ɣa kanaluk. taj mkjaħuʔ na kanaħʦ~ʨian ħjaʔ ɣa βaʦ~ʨiŋul. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kanaħʦ~ʨian ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kanahcian ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 39 buwan, 145 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 142 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 89%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kanahcian hya' ga Kanaluk. tay mkyahu' na Kanahcian hya' ga Bacingul. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kanahcian ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kanaħʦ~ʨian ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu umitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kanaħʦ~ʨian ħjaʔ ɣa kanaluk. taj mkjaħuʔ na kanaħʦ~ʨian ħjaʔ ɣa βaʦ~ʨiŋul. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kanaħʦ~ʨian ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
